lineage.Process: UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><FeatureDataset>Admin_boundaries</FeatureDataset><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\BSEYOUM\United Nations\OCHA Ethiopia - Information management\12_GIS\02_Base_Data_New\Admin_2025.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>RainfallSeason</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>12</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b RainfallSeason "JJAS" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b RainfallSeason "OND" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b RainfallSeason "OND" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b RainfallSeason "JJAS+OND" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><FeatureDataset>Admin_boundaries</FeatureDataset><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\BSEYOUM\United Nations\OCHA Ethiopia - Information management\12_GIS\02_Base_Data_New\Admin_2025.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>eth_admbnda_adm3_csa_bofed_2025b</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>MAM</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\WB541234\OneDrive - WBG\World Bank\GEMS\!_FCV\Woredas_FCVModified</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Eth_Admin3</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Merge</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Eth_Admin3 Merge !admin2Pcod! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\WB541234\OneDrive - WBG\World Bank\GEMS\!_FCV\Woredas_FCVModified</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Eth_Admin3</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>MergeTEXT</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

Dissolve Eth_Admin3 "C:\Users\WB541234\OneDrive - WBG\World Bank\GEMS\!_FCV\Woredas_FCVModified\Eth_Admin3_v2.shp" MergeTEXT # MULTI_PART DISSOLVE_LINES #
JoinField Eth_Admin3_v2 MergeTEXT Eth_Admin3 admin3Name admin3Pcod;admin3RefN;admin3AltN;admin2Name;admin2Pcod;admin1Name;admin1Pcod NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField Eth_Admin3_v2 admin3Pcod DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField Eth_Admin3_v2 admin3RefN DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField Eth_Admin3_v2 admin3AltN DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField Eth_Admin3_v2 admin2Name DELETE_FIELDS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\WB541234\OneDrive - WBG\World Bank\GEMS\!_FCV\Woredas_FCVModified</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Eth_Admin3_v2</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>admin2Pcod</field_name><field_name>admin1Name</field_name><field_name>admin1Pcod</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>
JoinField Eth_Admin3_v2 MergeTEXT Eth_Admin3 admin3Pcod admin3Name;admin3RefN;admin3AltN;admin2Name;admin2Pcod;admin1Name;admin1Pcod NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
